title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions!
